title.en: Typical Cases Where Local Performance Optimization Reduces System Availability
title.zh: 局部性能优化导致系统可用性下降的典型案例分析

summary.en: A systematic analysis of how local optimizations around thread pools, timeouts, retries, caches, connection pools, aggregation APIs, async execution, read/write splitting, batching, local caches, rate limiting, releases, resource isolation, idempotency, and observability can reduce system-wide availability.
summary.zh: 分析线程池、超时、重试、缓存、连接池、聚合接口、异步化、读写分离、批处理、本地缓存、限流、发布、资源隔离、幂等和可观测性等局部优化如何影响系统高可用，并给出工程治理清单。

readingDirection.en: Read this when reviewing high-concurrency or high-performance optimizations, defining reliability governance rules, evaluating load-test reports, performing incident reviews, planning canary releases, or setting capacity boundaries.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在做高并发/高性能优化、制定稳定性治理规范、压测评审、故障复盘、发布灰度和容量边界设计时阅读。
